summary.intent: Build a polished Electron app UI using Mantine as the component library, with a GitHub-inspired dark/light theme, improved sessions table with copy-to-clipboard and activity indicators, and a chat-transcript-style session detail view.
summary.outcome: Successfully migrated all screens/components to Mantine, implemented full dark/light mode with `light-dark()` CSS function, built a chat transcript UI with user bubbles and Claude cards with nested tool uses, and added breadcrumb navigation throughout.

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer — Electron app with electron-vite, React, React Router (MemoryRouter), Prisma/SQLite backend
PostCSS config must be `postcss.config.cjs` (not `.js`) for Mantine CSS variables to work with the Vite build
Activity status thresholds: <2min = green (active), <15min = orange (idle), else gray (inactive) — defined in SessionTree and replicated in SessionRow
CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt is the source for checkpoint timestamps (CheckpointMetadata has no createdAt)
Color scheme persisted via localStorage key 'gossamer-color-scheme' using Mantine's localStorageColorSchemeManager

code.finding: AppShell.Header must span full viewport width (above both navbar and main) so hamburger toggle is always visible regardless of sidebar state. Placing it inside AppShell.Main causes it to hide when sidebar collapses.
CopyCell component wraps Table.Td with hover-triggered absolutely-positioned ActionIcon for clipboard copy. Uses stopPropagation to prevent row navigation when clicking copy icon.
Code blocks had hardcoded colors (#1e293b background, #f1f5f9 inline) that didn't adapt to color scheme — required light-dark() replacement
groupClaudeTurns() merges consecutive tool groups + their following Stop event into a single Claude turn for rendering as one card with nested tool uses

workflow: Mantine's color-0 variants (e.g. var(--mantine-color-teal-0)) are always the lightest shade regardless of color scheme — must use light-dark() instead
light-dark(lightVal, darkVal) CSS function works reliably in Electron/Chromium and reads from Mantine's color-scheme set on <html>
Static Mantine color tokens like var(--mantine-color-dark-7) do NOT adapt to light/dark mode — only light-dark() does
React context (BreadcrumbContext) is the cleanest way to push breadcrumb data from child pages up to the Layout header
useEffect cleanup (return () => setBreadcrumbs([])) should be removed when the next page sets its own breadcrumbs — avoids flicker

friction: Dark mode required multiple iteration rounds — hardcoded light colors were scattered across 6+ files (SessionDetail, EventItem, ToolGroupItem, ToolUseItem, CheckpointMessageItem, MarkdownView)
Hamburger toggle button was hidden when sidebar closed because it was placed inside AppShell.Main — required understanding AppShell layout hierarchy to fix
Mantine color scheme variables (dark-7 etc.) look like they should adapt but are actually static — this is a non-obvious footgun
TypeScript type management for the claudeTurn union type required several edit passes to get the render loop correct
useLocation's state destructuring left an unused variable after refactoring — required cleanup pass
open_items: CheckpointDetail.tsx still uses var(--mantine-color-teal-0) and var(--mantine-color-gray-0) — likely needs same light-dark() treatment
CheckpointMessageItem.tsx uses var(--mantine-color-indigo-0) and #fff — not confirmed fixed in this session
Breadcrumbs on non-session screens (Checkpoints, CheckpointTimeline, CheckpointDetail, SessionTree) are not implemented yet
Mobile sidebar collapse not tested — AppShell breakpoint set to 'sm' but mobile layout untested in Electron
The 'Add column for most recent checkpoint id' feature was interrupted and replaced with the dropdown (which was then removed) — checkpoint quick-access from sessions table is unresolved
